Author: Miu-B
Name: PFBeacon
Punchline: Sanitized MINE Party Finder alerts for Discord.
Description: Observes Party Finder listings, filters for qualifying MINE raid listings, sends sanitized observations to the official PFBeacon service, and can show spoiler-safe local alerts from the global feed. Does not send PF descriptions, player names, recruiter names, worlds, or Discord routing data. Use /pfbeacon to configure.
